title: Exploding Water 4 - Driving a piston
description: Continuing on  - i used the same set up in the previous videos to drive a plastic plunger up a plastic tube. This actually worked quite well as long as you dampen the plunger - if you put too much water in the cylinder the plunger just sticks a bout half way - most curious. The other thing i did was to try a much lower powered version - using three photo flash caps and an fwbr - the water still exploded but not quite as dramatically as you can see and it certainly wasn't able to explode the water with the electrodes spread too far apart so i returned to the original spark gap. For anybody interested i have just set up a website - it's new - so not so good - but i'm getting there - the address is https://sites.google.com/site/aferlab/
